title: Redact emails from logs
prompt_md:
Logs must never leak personal data. A simple redaction pass replaces anything that looks like an email with a placeholder.

Write `redact_email(text)` that splits the text on spaces, replaces every token containing `"@"` with `"[redacted]"`, and rejoins the tokens with single spaces.

Example: `"contact a@b.com now"` -> `"contact [redacted] now"`.
hints: Build a new list: for each word, use "[redacted]" if "@" in word else the word. Then " ".join(...) it.
